Description: The objective of this test case is to validate: Phoenix requirements - Dev to send the latest 03/25 edition form in payload for Domestic New Business.
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Create a Domestic submission
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to create a submission successfully and proceed to line selection

Action: 3. Navigate to Line selection screen and select Inland Marine LOB
Expected Result: 3. User should be able to view the Inland Marine screen with all mandatory fields displayed

Action: 4. Select transaction type: New Business
Expected Result: 4. System should display transaction-specific fields and accept New Business inputs

Action: 5. Verify payload contains latest form edition 03/25
Expected Result: 5. API payload should include form ZC 6356 with edition date 03/25 and proper versioning

Action: 6. Fill mandatory fields and proceed
Expected Result: 6. No validation errors; data saved successfully

Action: 7. Price, Quote & Bind the policy
Expected Result: 7. Policy should be priced, quoted and bound without errors

Action: 8. Verify form metadata in documents
Expected Result: 8. Document section should show attached form with correct edition and version info

Description: The objective of this test case is to validate: Form Attachment - automatic attach of ZC 6356 with proper versioning for Produced New Business.
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Create a Produced submission
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to create a Produced submission successfully and proceed to line selection

Action: 3. Navigate to Line selection screen and select Contractors Equipment coverage
Expected Result: 3. User should be able to view coverage options including Contractors Equipment

Action: 4. Select Contractors Equipment coverage and choose form ZC 6356
Expected Result: 4. Form ZC 6356 should be auto-attached to the documents section upon selection

Action: 5. Verify the attached form is the latest edition 03/25
Expected Result: 5. Documents should show form ZC 6356 with edition date 03/25 and correct versioning

Action: 6. Fill mandatory fields and proceed
Expected Result: 6. No validation errors; data saved successfully

Action: 7. Price, Quote & Bind the policy
Expected Result: 7. Policy should be priced, quoted and bound without errors

Action: 8. Verify form metadata in documents
Expected Result: 8. Document section should show version metadata for the attached form

Description: The objective of this test case is to validate: Form Attachment auto-add behavior for Domestic Policy Change - Inception.
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Use the Run created in TC1 or create a new Domestic inception change
Expected Result: 2. User should reach the Line selection for the change

Action: 3. Navigate to Contractors Equipment coverage
Expected Result: 3. Contractors Equipment coverage should be accessible

Action: 4. Select form ZC 6356
Expected Result: 4. Form ZC 6356 should be automatically added to the documents section

Action: 5. Verify edition and versioning is 03/25
Expected Result: 5. Attached form should display edition date 03/25 and correct metadata

Action: 6. Fill mandatory fields and proceed
Expected Result: 6. No validation errors; data saved successfully

Action: 7. Price, Quote & Bind the policy change
Expected Result: 7. System should process the change and allow bind

Action: 8. Confirm document metadata in change payload
Expected Result: 8. Change payload should reference the correct form edition and version

Description: The objective of this test case is to validate: Effective date of the form (August release) for Produced New Business.
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Create a Produced submission with effective date aligned to release
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to set effective date to the August release date

Action: 3. Navigate to Contractors Equipment coverage and select ZC 6356
Expected Result: 3. Contractors Equipment coverage should be accessible and ZC 6356 selectable

Action: 4. Verify applied form edition matches effective date
Expected Result: 4. System should choose the latest form edition valid for the selected effective date (03/25 edition valid for August)

Action: 5. Fill mandatory fields and proceed
Expected Result: 5. No validation errors; data saved successfully

Action: 6. Price, Quote & Bind the policy
Expected Result: 6. Policy should be priced, quoted and bound without errors

Action: 7. Verify effective date in payload
Expected Result: 7. Payload should include the effective date and associated form edition metadata

Action: 8. Confirm document shows correct edition for effective date
Expected Result: 8. Documents should present the form edition consistent with the effective date
